Newsletter

My Work & Latest News

  • Constituency News

    There is nothing more important to me than being out and about in our communities; listening, helping and working alongside people to make things better. This is where I share updates from across South East Cornwall: school visits, community events, local campaigns, and the small everyday wins that make a big difference.

    If there’s something going on near you, or a local issue you think I should know about, please do get in touch - I would love to hear from you.

    Learn More

  • Parliamentary News

    London is a long way from Cornwall, but this is where I work to make sure our voice is heard. Whether I am speaking in debates, serving on the Environmental Audit Committee, or leading cross-party work on climate, finance and equality, I always have South East Cornwall in mind.

    This is the place where we can feel more connected between our community and Westminster - with updates on the issues I’m raising, the questions I’m asking, and the progress I’m pushing for on your behalf.

    Learn More

  • Latest Hot Topics

    Every week, people across South East Cornwall get in touch about the issues that matter most to them — and I take that seriously. Whether it is transport problems, housing delays, access to healthcare, or rising costs, these messages help shape the work I do both locally and in Parliament.

    This section highlights some of the key concerns coming into the office right now. It is a snapshot of what people are experiencing — and a reminder that I am here, I am listening, and I am taking action wherever I can.

    Learn More

Stay in the loop

Sign up with your email address to receive news and updates.

View our privacy policy here

Thank you!

Anna Gelderd MP
South East Cornwall Constituency

House of Commons,
London,
SW1A 0AA
